name: The city moved at your word

props.ChoiceTitle: The city moved at your word
props.ChoiceText: For one difficult season, markets opened, fines were paid, petitions slowed, and men with rank waited on your decision before acting in public.
props.ChoiceBio: When the city moved at your word, office stopped feeling borrowed and began to feel dangerously personal.

0.TransitionText: Because the city moving at your word taught you how near civic authority lies to personal power, office remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Magistrate, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: Powerful petitioners, clerks, and officers now measure opportunity by whether you approve it.
1.TransitionText: Because the city moving at your word taught you how near civic authority lies to personal power, office remained your daily craft.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Magistrate, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because the city moving at your word taught you how near civic authority lies to personal power, office remained your daily craft.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Magistrate, but you may remain on your current path instead.

0.TargetText: A whole chain of clerks, officers, and petitioners now acts as though your favor can still move the city.
